scripts.postinstall: npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix backend --ignore-scripts
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix backend --ignore-scripts
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "npm run dev --prefix backend"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix backend
scripts.build:backend: npm install --prefix backend --ignore-scripts && npm run build --prefix backend
scripts.start: concurrently "npm run start --prefix frontend" "npm run start --prefix backend"
